source_review.root_cause: The activation-changed path is modeled by ret > 0. The later reservation call is under if (!ret), so that path skips btrfs_block_rsv_add and reaches the void success exit with pending chunk metadata work.
source_review.suggested_change: Keep as a Protocol C finding candidate and compare against later/fixed versions before paper-stage adjudication.
source_review.notes: This is source-level development triage only; it is not counted as benchmark evidence.

review_focus: Confirm whether each open effect is compensated or transferred on failure.
Check callee summaries for cleanup hidden behind helper calls.

source_review.root_cause: fs_root->reloc_root is attached before the recovery commit. On commit failure, the visible failure path runs unset/free cleanup but no local compensation that clears the attached reloc_root pointer.
source_review.suggested_change: Keep as a Protocol B candidate and inspect fixed-version source or patch context to decide final adjudication.
source_review.notes: Confidence is medium because the local source path is clear, but cross-function ownership outside this slice should still be checked before claiming a confirmed bug.
